steps.title: Separate complex list items
steps.content: The sentence lists three language-learning resources: Chickasaw Basic in 2009, Chickasaw TV in 2010, and a Rosetta Stone course in 2015. Because the items contain internal commas, semicolons separate the list items.

steps.title: Reject misplaced punctuation
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B put a semicolon after Basic, separating the app name from its date. Choice D uses only commas, making the complex list hard to parse. The answer is C.
